commands.review_summary:
The PR removes skills browse result-count copy, moves the List/Grid toggle above search, keeps Clear for filtered states, and updates related tests and styles.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main renders `${model.sorted.length} results` in the `/skills` browse toolbar. I did not run the app because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; this member-authored PR has no actionable findings and remains open for ordinary maintainer review.

target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the `/skills` toolbar count copy entirely instead of showing a loaded-result count.
- Move the List/Grid view toggle above the skills search input.
- Keep the Clear control available for search/category/featured filtered states.
- Add coverage for empty, paginated browse, search pagination, category-filtered states, and the view-toggle/search order.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/styles.css`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- Local browser check at `http://127.0.0.1:3000/skills`: List/Grid renders above search at 390x844, 768x1024, and 1440x900; no `loaded` or `results` count copy; no horizontal overflow.

## UI Proof

- Local screenshots saved at `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-mobile.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-tablet.png`, and `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-desktop.png`.
target.author: jesse-merhi
